description: Get (bill of divorce). Location: Damsīs. Dated: Tuesday, 20 Shevat 4810 AM = 16 January 1050 CE. Husband: Menahem b. Yefet. Wife: Riḍā bt. Avraham. The document was written and signed by David b. Moshe, and also signed by Shemuel b. Avraham. Verso is blank. (Information from Goitein's note card.)
description_he: גט גירושין, דמסיס, 16 בינואר 1050, בעל: מנחם בן יפת, אישה: רידא בת אברהם, נכתב ונחתם על ידי דוד בן משה
